data:
Composable page blocks for rapid application development.
Blocks are pre-wired layouts that combine multiple design system
components into production-ready page sections.
data.available-blocks#Available Blocks: Block	Description	PageHeader	Title, breadcrumbs, and action toolbar	DataPageLayout	Grid + filters + toolbar composition	DetailPageLayout	Form + sidebar + tab navigation	DashboardGrid	Responsive widget grid layout	StatsRow	KPI metric cards in a row	FilterBar	Composable filter chip bar	EmptyState	Illustrated empty state placeholder	ErrorBoundary	Error fallback with retry action	LoadingSkeleton	Shimmer loading placeholders	WizardLayout	Multi-step wizard container	SplitView	Resizable two-pane layout	CommandPalette	Keyboard-driven command search	NotificationCenter	Toast and notification stack	ConfirmDialog	Confirmation modal with variants

data.installation#Installation:
Install the core design system package:
pnpm add @mfe/design-system
For X Suite packages, install individually:
pnpm add @mfe/x-data-grid @mfe/x-charts @mfe/x-editor
data.next-steps#Next Steps:
Explore the X Suite packages for enterprise features
Browse Blocks for pre-built page compositions
Check Migration guides if coming from another library

data:
Enterprise-grade React component library with 100+ components,
6 X Suite packages, and a composable block system.
data.architecture#Architecture:
The design system follows a layered architecture:
Core — Theme tokens, utility hooks, base primitives
Components — 112 production-ready UI components
X Suite — Six domain-specific enterprise packages
Blocks — Composable page-level building blocks
All packages share a single theme provider and are tree-shakeable.

data:
How to migrate from popular libraries to @mfe/design-system
and X Suite packages.
data.available-guides#Available Guides: From	To	Effort	MUI DataGrid	@mfe/x-data-grid	Medium	AG Grid (raw)	@mfe/x-data-grid	Low	Recharts	@mfe/x-charts	Low	Draft.js	@mfe/x-editor	High	react-beautiful-dnd	@mfe/x-kanban	Medium	FullCalendar	@mfe/x-scheduler	Medium	react-jsonschema-form	@mfe/x-form-builder	Low
data.general-approach#General Approach: Each migration follows a three-phase approach:
data.phase-2--incremental-replacement#Phase 2:
Replace adapters with direct @mfe usage one page at a time.
Run both libraries in parallel during the transition.
data.phase-3--cleanup#Phase 3 — Cleanup:
Remove the legacy library dependency and adapter code.
Run the full test suite to verify feature parity.
data.codemods#Codemods:
Automated codemods are available for common transformations:
npx @mfe/codemod mui-datagrid-to-xdg ./src
npx @mfe/codemod recharts-to-xcharts ./src
data.need-help#Need Help?:
Open an issue on the platform-ssot
repository with the migration label.

data:
Data visualization package with 18 chart components built
for enterprise dashboards and reporting.
data.quick-start#Quick Start:
import { BarChart, LineChart, PieChart } from '@mfe/x-charts';
<BarChart
  data={salesData}
  xField="month"
  yField="revenue"
  color="primary"
/>
data.chart-types#Chart Types: Component	Use Case	BarChart	Category comparisons	LineChart	Trends over time	AreaChart	Volume trends	PieChart	Part-to-whole ratios	ScatterChart	Correlation analysis	RadarChart	Multi-axis comparison	GaugeChart	KPI indicators	HeatmapChart	Density visualization	TreemapChart	Hierarchical proportions	FunnelChart	Conversion pipelines
data.theming#Theming:
Charts inherit the global palette from ThemeProvider automatically.
Override per-chart with the color or palette props:
<LineChart
  data={metrics}
  xField="date"
  yField="users"
  palette={['#1a56db', '#e74c3c', '#2ecc71']}
  animate
/>
data.responsive-behavior#Responsive Behavior:
All charts are responsive by default. Use the aspectRatio prop
to control proportions:
<BarChart data={data} xField="q" yField="sales" aspectRatio={16 / 9} />
data.export#Export:
Export charts as PNG or SVG using the useChartExport hook:
const { exportPng, exportSvg } = useChartExport(chartRef);

data:
Recipe layer over AG Grid 34.3 with variant persistence,
column builder, and server-side patterns.
data.variants#Variants: Variant	Description	default	Standard row height, full feature set	compact	Dense layout for data-heavy views	master-detail	Expandable rows with nested grids	tree	Hierarchical row grouping
data.column-builder#Column Builder:
The fluent useColumnBuilder API provides type-safe column definitions:
const columns = useColumnBuilder<Product>()
  .text('name', { flex: 2 })
  .number('stock', { editable: true })
  .currency('price', { currency: 'TRY' })
  .action('edit', { icon: 'pencil', onClick: handleEdit })
  .build();
data.variant-persistence#Variant Persistence:
Grid state (column order, sort, filters) persists automatically
per user and per variant via the useGridPersistence hook.

data:
Rich text editing package with 13 components for content authoring,
inline annotations, and collaborative editing patterns.
data.components#Components: Component	Purpose	RichEditor	Full-featured WYSIWYG editor	MarkdownEditor	Markdown source with live preview	InlineEditor	Click-to-edit inline text	CodeBlock	Syntax-highlighted code editing	MentionPlugin	@mention autocomplete	CommentThread	Inline annotation threads	ImageUploader	Drag-and-drop image insertion	TableEditor	Visual table manipulation	EmojiPicker	Emoji insertion palette	LinkDialog	URL insertion with preview	SlashCommand	Slash-command block insertion	ToolbarButton	Custom toolbar extension point	EditorProvider	Context provider for nested editors
data.toolbar-customization#Toolbar Customizat:
Build custom toolbars by composing toolbar items:
<RichEditor
  toolbar={[
    'bold', 'italic', 'underline',
    '|',
    'heading', 'bulletList', 'orderedList',
    '|',
    'link', 'image', 'table',
  ]}
/>

data:
Dynamic form generation from JSON schema with 12 components
for building, rendering, and validating complex forms.
data.components#Components: Component	Purpose	FormBuilder	Visual drag-and-drop form designer	FormRenderer	Renders forms from JSON schema	FieldPalette	Available field type sidebar	FieldConfig	Field property editor panel	SectionBlock	Grouped field section	ConditionalRule	Show/hide logic builder	ValidationRule	Field validation configurator	RepeatableGroup	Dynamic array of field groups	FormPreview	Live form preview pane	SchemaImport	Import schema from JSON/YAML	SchemaExport	Export schema to JSON/YAML	SubmissionViewer	View submitted form data
data.validation#Validation:
Built-in validators include required, min, max, pattern,
email, url, and custom async validators.

data:
Six specialized packages for enterprise application development.
Each package extends the core design system with domain-specific
components and patterns.
data.packages#Packages: Package	Purpose	Components	x-data-grid	AG Grid recipe layer	11	x-charts	Data visualization	18	x-editor	Rich text editing	13	x-kanban	Board & workflow views	11	x-scheduler	Calendar & scheduling	14	x-form-builder	Dynamic form generation	12
data.installation#Installation:
Install any X Suite package alongside the core library:
pnpm add @mfe/design-system @mfe/x-data-grid

data:
Calendar and scheduling package with 14 components for
event management, resource booking, and timeline views.
data.components#Components: Component	Purpose	Scheduler	Full calendar with view switching	DayView	Single day hour grid	WeekView	7-day columnar layout	MonthView	Monthly calendar grid	TimelineView	Horizontal resource timeline	AgendaView	List-based event display	EventCard	Draggable event block	ResourceColumn	Resource allocation column	DateNavigator	Date range navigation bar	ViewSwitcher	View mode toggle	MiniCalendar	Compact date picker sidebar	RecurrenceEditor	Recurrence rule builder	ConflictIndicator	Overlapping event warning	AvailabilityOverlay	Working hours highlight
data.views#Views:
Switch between views with the view prop:
<Scheduler
  events={events}
  view="month"        // 'day' | 'week' | 'month' | 'timeline' | 'agenda'
  resources={rooms}   // Required for timeline view
/>

data:
Board and workflow visualization with drag-and-drop columns,
swimlanes, and WIP limits.
data.components#Components: Component	Purpose	KanbanBoard	Full board with columns	KanbanColumn	Single column container	KanbanCard	Draggable card item	KanbanSwimlane	Horizontal row grouping	KanbanHeader	Column header with actions	KanbanFooter	Column footer (add item)	KanbanFilter	Board-level filter bar	KanbanAvatar	Assignee avatar chip	KanbanLabel	Color-coded label tag	KanbanWipLimit	WIP limit indicator	KanbanCollapsed	Collapsed column state
data.drag-and-drop#Drag and Drop:
Cards support drag-and-drop between columns with animated transitions.
The onMove callback receives source and destination metadata.
